hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *"/.env"|.env) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":".env contains live API keys; access is blocked by a project hook"}}' ;; esac
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.py) uv run ruff format "$f" 2>/dev/null && uv run ruff check --fix "$f" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; true
